arts.ttl: Spurs booed off as Leicester comeback piles pressure on Postecoglou
arts.sum: Spurs slumped to a fourth straight Premier League loss as strugglers Leicester fought back from a goal down to claim their first win in nine games at a mutinous Tottenham Hotspur Stadium.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou responds to angry Tottenham fans as sack fears grow after Leicester loss
arts.sum: Tottenham suffered another humiliating day as they lost 2-1 at home to Leicester, who started Sunday in the relegation zone after losing their previous seven Premier League games

arts.ttl: Van Nistelrooy hails Leicester ‘leader’ after Spurs win
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy has hailed Jamie Vardy as a leader by example after the Leicester’s captain scored in the club’s 2-1 win at Tottenham. Vardy equalised just 57 seconds into the second half in North London, as the Foxes came from behind to claim a crucial win. Bilal El Khannouss got the winner for Leicester, […] The post Van Nistelrooy hails Leicester ‘leader’ after Spurs win first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou reveals Tottenham suffered new injury blow in shock Leicester loss
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur manager Ange Postecoglou confirms that Richarlison had to come off in Sunday's shock 2-1 defeat to Leicester City due to injury.

arts.ttl: Everton, Leicester City joined by European giant in race for 27-year-old Premier League full-back?
arts.sum: Galatasaray are reportedly battling Premier League clubs for Southampton defender Kyle Walker-Peters, with the Turkish side approaching the Saints over a potential deal.

arts.ttl: Tottenham 1-2 Leicester: Match report & talking points from second-half Spurs collapse
arts.sum: Four key takeaways from Tottenham's 2-1 defeat to Leicester City.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou explains Richarlison substitution after Tottenham boos
arts.sum: Spurs crisis continues as Leicester come from behind to claim big win

arts.ttl: Leicester stun Tottenham to increase pressure on Ange Postecoglou
arts.athr: Jacob Steinberg at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium
arts.sum: Away from the mutinous chants pouring down from the south stand, the unmistakeable disgust with Daniel Levy and the gathering angst around Ange Postecoglou, it was possible to forget about Leicester. Ruud van Nistelrooy’s side have endured a horrible winter and, when they found themselves behind to a fragile Tottenham at half-time, they had the look of a group waiting for the sweet release of relegation. At that stage they were on their way to their eighth consecutive defeat in the Premier League, equalling a club record set in the 2000-01 season. If history was a guide, though, then playing Spurs was good news for Van Nistelrooy. After all Leicester stopped the rot by beating them 4-2 at Filbert Street 24 years ago. Continue reading...
Leicester manager Ruud van Nistelrooy says his side "needed" the 2-1 win at Tottenham that ends their seven-game losing streak in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Every word Ange Postecoglou said as downbeat Tottenham boss suffers new low and relegation fears grow
arts.sum: The former Celtic boss looked utterly dejected at full-time as Spurs crashed to defeat at home to second-bottom Leicester City
